title: Request for Reinstatement and Administrative Review of Case Status
body:
Date: {{date}}

To: Assigned Vocational Rehabilitation Counselor (VRC) / VREO
VA Regional Office

Subject: Request for Reinstatement and Administrative Review of Case Status
Veteran: [Your Name]
Case Status Stage: {{stage}}

Dear VRC / VREO,

I am writing to formally request an administrative review and reinstatement of my Chapter 31 case, which was recently interrupted or discontinued.

My case was paused/closed based on the assertion: "{{reasonGiven}}"
Notice Details:
- Written warning received: {{hadNotice}}
- Formal decision VA Form 20-0998 received: {{hadVaf200998}}
- Service-Connected Rating 50% or more: {{isFiftyPercentOrMore}}

Under 38 C.F.R. § 21.197, § 21.198, and M28C guidelines, the VA should provide a prior written warning and a formal opportunity to respond before interrupting or discontinuing a veteran's active rehabilitation plan. Furthermore, under 38 C.F.R. § 21.198(b)(7), the VR&E Officer (VREO) must review each proposed discontinuance for a veteran with a service-connected disability rated 50% or more disabling. Reinstating my case will allow us to address any concerns.

I request a local administrative conference to discuss the reinstatement of my case and to amend my plan if medical or vocational adjustments are needed.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
